race_meta.race_name: Best Odds Guaranteed Overnight At CopyBet Novices' Limited Handicap Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner cosmic soul was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Carlton with 28.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Carlton > Pottersmattyeeehaa, but actual result was Cosmic Soul > Captain Cool. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
